title: Create useKiokuSearch composable with unit tests
acceptance_criteria: File app/composables/useKiokuSearch.ts exists and exports a function useKiokuSearch().
useKiokuSearch() returns an object with: query (Ref<string>), results (Ref<KiokuSearchResponse | null>), pending (Ref<boolean>), error (Ref<string | null>), and search(q: string): Promise<void>.
Calling search('') clears results and does NOT call $fetch.
Calling search('someterm') sets pending=true, calls POST /api/kioku/search with body { query: 'someterm' }, then sets results and pending=false.
On fetch error, error is set to the error message string and results remains null.
File app/composables/useKiokuSearch.test.ts exists with at least 3 test cases covering: successful search, empty query short-circuit, and fetch error handling.
bun test composables/useKiokuSearch.test.ts passes with 0 failures.
bun run typecheck exits with code 0 for the composable file.
completion_summary: Added useKiokuSearch with empty-query short-circuiting, POST-backed search execution, error handling, and unit tests for success, empty, and failure cases.
